ValidationRule.description: User only able to create contact within his/her country
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( NOT( $Profile.Name == 'System Administrator' || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Head Office') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'HO Operations Manager') || ($User.Country == 'Malaysia' && MailingCountry== 'Brunei') ), OR ( ($User.Country = 'India' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != UPPER($User.Country)), (CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales 1') && (UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'MALAYSIA' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'SINGAPORE') ), (CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales 2') && (UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'INDONESIA' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'PHILIPPINES') ), (CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales 3') && (UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'THAILAND' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'VIETNAM') ), ( ISPICKVAL($User.Region__c, 'ANZ') && ( NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Regional Sales')) && NOT(CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Back Office Operations Manager')) && ( (UPPER($User.Country) == 'AUSTRALIA' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'AUSTRALIA') || (UPPER($User.Country) == 'NEW ZEALAND' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'NEW ZEALAND') ) ) ), ( (CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Regional Sales') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'ANZ Back Office Operations Manager')) && (UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'AUSTRALIA' && UPPER(MailingCountry) != 'NEW ZEALAND') ), ( NOT( CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Zonal Sales') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Regional Sales') || CONTAINS($UserRole.Name, 'Back Office') ) && UPPER(MailingCountry) != UPPER($User.Country) && NOT( CONTAINS(UPPER(MailingCountry), 'AFGHANISTAN') || CONTAINS(UPPER(MailingCountry), 'CAMBODIA') || CONTAINS(UPPER(MailingCountry), 'LAO') || CONTAINS(UPPER(MailingCountry), 'MYANMAR') || CONTAINS(UPPER(MailingCountry), 'PAKISTAN') ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You can only create a Contact within your country. Please double check your Contact Mailing Country.
